disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: 3 dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship: What to know - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.body_en: 3 dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship: What to know ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮疑似汉坦病毒爆发致3人死亡。

updates.title_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 接触汉坦病毒邮轮的旅客结束自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Self-isolation over for travellers exposed to hantavirus - Yahoo News Canada
updates.body_en: Self-isolation over for travellers exposed to hantavirus Yahoo News Canada
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大接触汉坦病毒的旅客结束自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period - CBC
updates.body_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大邮轮接触汉坦病毒者完成隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak nearing its end , WHO chief says
updates.summary_zh: WHO 总干事称汉坦病毒爆发接近尾声。

updates.title_en: US Ends Hantavirus Outbreak Response with No Answers
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦病毒爆发应对，未找到答案。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒疫情响应。

updates.title_en: Irish woman stuck on hantavirus ship says she cant believe she escaped virus
updates.summary_zh: 爱尔兰女子被困汉坦病毒邮轮后称幸存。

updates.title_en: Kenya health system put to test amid Ebola preparedness
updates.summary_zh: 肯尼亚卫生系统面临埃博拉防控考验。
